name: Beef and Bacon Over Pasta (Fgkg27a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 6 slices of bacon and sauté until crisp. Remove from heat.
2. Add minced garlic, chopped onion, and chopped green pepper to the pan. Sauté lightly in bacon grease.
3. Stir in 2 tablespoons of flour, ensuring it is smooth.
4. Slowly stir in 2-1/2 cups of beef stock. Add sage, salt, pepper, and chopped parsley. Mix well.
5. Add leftover rare beef (bite-sized pieces) and 1 can of black-eyed peas to the mixture. Simmer until heated through.
6. Serve over warm pasta with grated Parmesan cheese. This dish is also delicious with chipped beef.
